summary: Separated read-only audit from explicit repair, added dashboard semantic validation, fixed direct rebuild and daily repair wiring, and serialized Community Intelligence publication.
risks: pre-existing uncommitted Community Intelligence skill mirror drift remains intentionally unsynchronized
lessons: audit commands must never mutate before measuring drift
generated dashboards need an independent contract at every reachable producer

run dashboard contract after every rebuild
do not sync dirty unrelated skills

generated artifacts must come from committed inputs
contracts belong in the producer boundary

use one lock per shared writer
validate clean generated artifacts separately from dirty local diagnostics
